comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list[str]). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_bulkammo.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. ASYNC-Playwright (async_api); Magento (#catalog-listing li.item cards, ?p= pagination). Scraper keys off RETAILER_ID=14 (no slug lookup). BulkAmmo standardized on leading-period caliber slugs (.380/.40/.357/.223/.300) plus shortened suffixes (-spl/-mag) — preserved EXACTLY. 223-556 splits into .223 + 5.56 categories; both bucket to 223-556, seen_ids dedups overlap. Migration wiring: loader + report_empty_first_pages (swap of the inline EMPTY_FAIL_THRESHOLD block) + category_redirected at page 1 + had_success. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
